summary: Closed all 5 PR1.3 ITERATE findings on ProductRoom shell: planks now use 3 explicit slate constants (PLANK_TIERS) with y bumped to 0.225 (15mm above base), rug border switched from cyan emissive to non-emissive deep slate textile trim, ceiling cove subdivided into 3x3 coffer grid, and baseboard/top-trim side pieces shortened to ROOM-0.10 so corners no longer co-plane.
